identity.name: Marmitaria da Xai
identity.target_audience: Locals in Campo Grande-MS looking for quality homemade food

primary.name: Oswald
primary.usage: Headings, Menu Item Names, Price Tags

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-[#1A0A00] hover:bg-[#FFB84D] font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#F5A623] text-[#F5A623] hover:bg-[#F5A623] hover:text-[#1A0A00] font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 animate-bounce-subtle

cards.menu_item: bg-[#3D2410] border border-[#F0C060]/20 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg hover:border-[#F5A623] transition-colors duration-300 group
cards.testimonial: bg-[#2B1A0E] border border-[#F0C060]/10 p-8 rounded-2xl relative

components.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-40 bg-[#2B1A0E]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#F0C060]/10 transition-all duration-300

content_strategy.hero_subheadline: O sabor que você ama, no conforto da sua casa ou trabalho. Peça agora sua marmita quentinha.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #F0C060 text is only used on dark backgrounds (#2B1A0E). Use #FFFFFF for small body text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add Google Fonts 'Oswald' (weights 500,700) and 'DM Sans' (weights 400,500) in index.html or css.
Configure Tailwind theme colors to match the 'colors' object exactly.
Create a reusable 'Section' component that handles the alternating backgrounds (#2B1A0E vs #3D2410).
Use the provided WhatsApp link for all primary CTAs: https://wa.me/5567982017678
Ensure the Navbar is sticky and changes background opacity on scroll.
Do NOT use standard HTML tags without styling; always add rounded corners and subtle shadows.
Implement the 'Menu' section using a responsive grid of cards.
For the 'How it Works' section, use a 3-step process with Lucide icons (Phone, ChefHat, Bike).
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere; use asymmetry in the Hero section if possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (py-20 instead of py-10).
Add subtle noise texture overlay to the entire body to give it that 'rustic' paper/material feel.
Never use gradients for text colors.
Ensure all images have alt text for accessibility.
